name: switch
title: Switch
description: A toggle switch control for enabling or disabling settings, with optional label.

docs.overview: Switch is a toggle control for binary on/off selections, rendered as a rounded track with a sliding indicator. It shows primary color when on and secondary when off.
docs.usage: Switch({ label: 'Dark mode', checked: false, onChange: (v) => darkMode.set(v) })
docs.accessibility: Uses role 'switch'. Provide a label or accessibilityLabel for screen readers. The checked state is communicated to assistive technology.

platformNotes.macos: Uses native AppKit toggle behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.ios: Uses native UIKit switch behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.linux: Uses native GTK switch behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.windows: Uses current Perry Windows backend behavior.
platformNotes.web: Rendered as styled switch element through Perry web target.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed beside the switch

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and dim the switch

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback when the switch is toggled

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Screen reader label (falls back to label if provided)

examples.name: controlled
examples.title: Controlled Switch
examples.code: Switch({ checked: true, label: 'Auto-save', onChange: (v) => autoSave.set(v) })

examples.name: settings-panel
examples.title: Settings Panel
examples.code:
VStack(12, [
  Switch({ label: 'Dark mode', onChange: (v) => dark.set(v) }),
  Switch({ label: 'Notifications', onChange: (v) => notif.set(v) }),
  Switch({ label: 'Auto-update', disabled: true }),
])

agent.summary: Switch for binary on/off toggles in settings and preference panels
doNotUseWhen: Selecting from mutually exclusive options (use Radio)
layoutHints: Stack vertically for multiple switches in settings
accessibilityChecklist: Ensure on/off state is visually distinct
